Save time, refill online.

Refill or renew an existing prescription online when you set up your prescriptions. Plus, keep track of your medications in one place, view your prescription history, and more.

Personalized care starts here

Are you missing a vaccine?

Lifemark

Reach your health goals with Lifemark

Book physiotherapy, chiropractic, and massage therapy sessions on web or app

Check your symptoms

Use the symptom checker to explore your symptoms and discover where to find the right care for you.

*There is no cost to access the program including initial virtual consultation with a nurse and other consultations such as with a dietitian. However, costs may apply for medication and/or treatment suggested as part of the program.

**Your Pharmacist will assess and confirm your eligibility and clinical appropriateness for the service. Based on Pharmacist clinical assessment, a lab requisition may be considered more clinically appropriate. Available in BC, AB, ON, NB, NS and PEI.​

 ***If appropriate, based on clinical assessment. Subject to pharmacist availability and the nature of your condition. Pre-booked appointments may be required.

†Vaccine assessment is available in AB, BC, and ON for users 18+ and assesses eligibility for the following vaccinations: RSV, Shingles, Pneumonia, TDAP (tetanus, diphtheria, and pertussis)
